1.description: Neo is an online game that belongs to a very popular casino website in LatAm. I was responsible for redesigning the UI using Adobe XD and improve usability and user experience for old and new players.

2.description: DVT Streaming is a platform to watch live and recorded Soccer Matches online. I was responsible for redesigning the UI using Adobe XD and improve usability and user experience for old and new players.

3.description: Combate Gamer is a place where eSports happens. This website was created using VueJS framework as required. Implementing best development practices with web components.
